seo.title: About Us | FAS-Technology — Engineering at Your Side
seo.description: FAS-Tech is an engineering, manufacturing and consultancy group specialising in access, lifting and height safety systems. Learn about our values, certifications and team.

hero.title: Engineering at your side
hero.lead: FAS-Tech is a dynamic engineering, manufacturing and consultancy group of experienced specialists from the building services industry.

story.imageAlt: FAS-Technology engineering team at a building access project
paragraphs: With extensive experience in access and lifting solutions as well as height safety systems, we focus on our clients — listening and providing full support throughout every stage of your project.
We innovate by developing and creating premium quality products, giving full support to architects, consultants, developers, general contractors and clients all around the world.

The quality of our range of products and solutions is verified by a dedicated department responsible for compliance with current design standards and for controlling production processes during manufacturing.

Buildings will continue to require highly engineered, reliable and cost-effective access solutions. As a team, we are dedicated to guiding our customers to overcome and solve any technological challenge that may arise.

items.label: Innovation
items.line: Premium products and engineering support for every project stage.

items.label: Quality
items.line: Standards compliance and controlled manufacturing processes.

items.label: Customer satisfaction
items.line: Listening first, supporting you from concept to delivery.

support.heading: Real engineering support for your unique project
support.text: At any time in your project we will support you to find the best solution for accessing safely at any height — aligned with your budget and applicable regulations.

certifications.heading: Certifications
certifications.intro: Safety is of utmost importance for us. This is the reason why we only offer equipment, solutions and machines certified to the latest applicable regulations and standards.

items.description: This European Directive specifies the essential requirements which Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) must comply with before being placed on the market.
EN 1808 is a European Standard which specifies the safety requirements for Suspended Access Equipment.
This European Standard defines the technical requirements for vertical rigid anchor lines, whether attached to ladders, rungs or fixed to structures.

This technical specification certifies multi-user devices — anchor devices that allow more than one user to be attached at the same time. It is always applied in combination with a product certified according to EN 795:2012.

EN 795 defines the technical requirements for anchor devices. This standard indicates which loads horizontal fall arrest solutions must withstand and how they are to be tested and certified. EN 795 distinguishes five types of anchorage device, from A to E. This standard does not consider multi-user applications.
This European Standard specifies technical requirements for sit harnesses with a low point of attachment. Sit harnesses can be used in restraint, work positioning and rope access systems.
This European Directive specifies the safety requirements for machinery. Annex IV concerns lifting equipment. All height access machines of FAS-Tech are certified according to Directive 2006/42/EC.
This European Standard specifies requirements for personal protective equipment against falls from a height, such as connectors.

This European Standard describes general requirements for instructions for use, maintenance, periodic examination, repair, marking and packaging for personal protective equipment against falls from a height.
This European Standard describes the technical requirements for full body harnesses.
This European Standard applies to belts and lanyards intended for work positioning or restraint. Positioning lanyards are available when the user works in restraint.
This European Standard specifies the technical requirements for retractable type fall arresters.
